_comment: Dify MCP Client Plugin Manifest for Insurance Sales Platform
name: Insurance Sales MCP Integration
description: Connects Dify ReAct agents to insurance sales MCP server (product query, compliance check, needs assessment, objection handling, SOP execution)
author: 总指挥协调虾 (OpenClaw Insurance Sales Platform)

tools.dify_tool_alias: 保险产品名称与条款查询
tools.description: Query Hong Kong insurance products by name/keyword, return coverage details and compliance points
Check content against HKIA compliance rules (RL-002, YL-001, etc.), return risk level and violations
Assess client needs and assign priority grade (A/B/C), with scoring criteria
Generate compliant objection handling scripts by category and urgency level
Execute private traffic onboarding SOP (Day-0 to Day-7) with session state tracking

option_a_dify_mcp_client_plugin.description: Use d3f-project/dify-mcp-client (166⭐, stdio/sse/http) as Agent Strategy Plugin

option_b_langchain_mcp_adapters.code_example:
from langchain_mcp_adapters.client import connect_mcp_server
client = await connect_mcp_server('http', 'localhost:18060')
option_b_langchain_mcp_adapters.description: Use langchain-ai/langchain-mcp-adapters for LangGraph agent integration

compliance_notes.data_residency: PRIVATE_DEPLOYMENT = NONE出境风险. If using Dify cloud, upgrade to self-hosted to avoid data export.
compliance_notes.gl44_alignment: All insurance product queries and compliance checks run locally or on private server
compliance_notes.red_line: No cross-border insurance sales via AI tools. All consultations must direct users to Hong Kong境内投保
